sources.title: The Virgin of Stamboul | classic movie
sources.channelName: Public Domain Movies - Classic Old Movies

metadata.Plot: Achmet Bey, a Turkish chieftain, catches one of his many wives in adultery and murders her lover. Throwing aside the cuckolding wife, he abducts his harem an innocent girl. However, a brave American who loves her comes to her rescue.
metadata.Writer: Tod Browning, William Parker, H.H. Van Loan
metadata.Actors: Priscilla Dean, Wheeler Oakman, Wallace Beery
